svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="comm-stack" name="Communication Protocol Stack"> <mxGraphModel dx="-424" dy="-132" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="800" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Communication Protocol Stack (SE-03)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="10" width="500" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="app" value="Application Layer
Protobuf messages (sentinel.proto)
Length-prefixed framing: [4B len][1B type][payload]" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="60" width="600" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="transport" value="Transport Layer
TCP (Port 5000: commands | Port 5001: telemetry | Port 5002: diagnostics)
Reliable, ordered byte stream" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="140" width="600" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="network" value="Network Layer
IPv4 (192.168.7.0/24 subnet)
Static IP: Linux = .1, MCU = .2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="220" width="600" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="datalink" value="Data Link Layer
CDC-ECM (Ethernet over USB)
Ethernet frames" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="300" width="600" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="physical" value="Physical Layer
USB 2.0 Full Speed (12 Mbps)
Virtual USB bridge in QEMU" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="380" width="600" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_linux" value="Linux
(protobuf-c)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="70" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_mcu" value="MCU
(nanopb)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="710" y="70" width="70" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lbl_lwip" value="lwIP" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#9673a6;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="710" y="150" width="70" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 380px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
